query:
SELECT inputType, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(monthlyCost),2) as avg_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_service
FROM retail_bundle_cost_inputs 
GROUP BY inputType
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
